summary: Compile clean (3 pdflatex + bibtex passes all exit 0). 11/11 citations resolve. 31/31 prose numerical claims reconcile to source. Two MAJOR flags: 10-page PDF vs 4-page workshop budget (M1) and two internal-memo cites needing arXiv replacement (M2). One minor citation-dimensionality nit (M3). No critical flags.
